name: Features · Numbered callouts

do: four numbered circle callouts connected by thin lines
callout color taken from brand accent
dont: no callout pointing to ambiguous parts of the product

body: Amazon listing features image for {{PRODUCT_NAME}}, 2000×2000 square. Centered hero shot of the product on a {{BRAND_PRIMARY_COLOR_NAME}} background. Four numbered callouts in {{BRAND_ACCENT_COLOR}} circles arranged around the product, connected to specific product features by thin {{BRAND_ACCENT_COLOR}} lines. The four callouts read: {{FEATURE_LIST}}. Callout typography: {{BRAND_FONT_PRIMARY}}, uppercase, tight letter spacing. The product remains the focal anchor.

angles.name: Gold-circle callouts (default)
angles.description: Four callouts with the Barebells-style gold-circle treatment.

angles.name: Icon cards instead of numbers
angles.description: Each callout is a small icon card rather than a numbered circle.
angles.prompt_modifier: Replace the numbered circles with small rectangular icon cards. Each card has a simple line-art icon on top and the feature label underneath. Cards float at a subtle 5-degree skew for energy.
